title: manilkara multinervis subsp. argentea
intro: Manilkara multinervis subsp. argentea, also known as the Silver-leaved Strangler Fig, is a subspecies of the Manilkara multinervis tree, native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and fever. The health benefits of Manilkara multinervis subsp. argentea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the leaves or bark, and are typically used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
